LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS JORGE ALEJANDRO, AND LERMA PADUA'S MOTION FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF FOR HIS REFUSAL TO PARTICIPATE IN THE EARLY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S UNILATERAL FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE DECEMBER 5 ESC AND UNILATERAL CANCELLATION OF THE JANUARY 12 ESC VIOLATE LOCAL RULES AND INTERFERE WITH THE COURT'S CASE MANAGEMENT. PLAINTIFF MUST REIMBURSE DEFENDANT'S IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,465.00. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF'S REMITTANCE FOR THE PAYMENT OF THESE SANCTIONS MUST BE PAYABLE NO LATER THAN 30 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER AND 35 DAYS IF SERVICE IS BY MAIL. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

MINI MINUTES: Judge James Robertson, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Reporter Joyce Long. (502)

APPEARANCES:
Ronald C. Chauvel, Greene Chauvel Descalso & Minoletti, representing the plaintiff (Court Call).
Plaintiff Alejandro is present in open court.
Jonathan D. Weinberg, Law Offices of Wayne McFadden, representing the defendant (Court Call).

This matter comes on calendar for a status conference regarding the settlement agreements. The court will hear the plaintiff's Motion to Enforce Settlement on 5/12/09 at 2:30 p.m. The motion will be filed by 4/13/09, opposition due by 4/28/09 and the reply due by 5/4/09. All payment dates are extended. The next status conference is set for April 6, 2009 at 1:30 p.m.

Notice Of Motion For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf For His Refusal To Participate In The Early Settlement Conference
Off Calendar Feb-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KATRINA C. DECKER OF THE LAW FIRM OF GREENE, CHAUVEL, DESCALSO & MINOLETTI, TEL. NO. (650) 573-9500 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JONATHAN D. WEINBERG OF THE LAW OFFICES OF WAYNE A. MCFADDEN, TEL. NO. (650) 340-7100 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS AND MOVING PARTIES.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS JORGE ALEJANDRO AND LERMA PADUA'S Motion For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff For His Refusal To Participate In The Early Settlement Conference IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S UNILATERAL FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE DECEMBER 5 E S C AND UNILATERIAL CANCELLATION OF THE JANUARY 12 E S C VIOLATE LOCAL RULES AND INTERFERE WITH THE COURT'S CASE MANAGEMENT. PLAINTIFF MUST REIMBURSE DEFENDANT'S IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,465.00. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF'S REMITTANCE FOR THE PAYMENT OF THESE SANCTIONS MUST BE PAYABLE NO LATER THAN 30 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER AND 35 DAYS IF SERVICE IS BY MAIL. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR# 8189 =301/PJB
